Perfect Space

From intimate executive suites to expansive two-bedroom family apartments — every room is fully furnished and ready from day one.

Accommodation

Flexible Rooms for Every Need

Our 3-bedroom apartment offers complete flexibility. Book one room, two rooms, or the entire apartment — the hall and kitchen are shared common areas, making it perfect for corporate professionals and families alike.

Shared Common Areas

Hall & kitchen shared between room guests

Most Flexible
1-2 GuestsPrivate Bedroom

Single Room Stay

One private, fully-furnished bedroom in our 3-bedroom apartment. The hall and kitchen are comfortable shared common areas — ideal for solo corporate professionals.

Hall & Kitchen shared with other guests in the apartment.
Private BedroomShared HallShared KitchenFree BreakfastSmart TVACWi-Fi
₹ 1000/ month
Enquire Now
Great for Colleagues
2-4 Guests2 Private Bedrooms

Two-Room Stay

Two private bedrooms in our apartment, with the hall and kitchen as shared common areas. Great for two colleagues from the same company staying together.

Hall & Kitchen shared — ideal for teams from the same company.
2 Private BedroomsShared HallShared KitchenFree Breakfast2 ACsSmart TVWi-Fi
₹ 2000/ month
Enquire Now
Best for Families
Up to 6 GuestsEntire Apartment

Full 3-Bedroom Apartment

Book the entire 3-bedroom apartment exclusively for your family or group. You get complete private use of all 3 bedrooms, the hall, and the fully-equipped kitchen.

Entire apartment exclusively yours — no sharing.
3 Private BedroomsExclusive HallPrivate KitchenFree Breakfast3 ACsWashing MachineParking
₹ 3000/ month
